title: Ocean & Coral Reef Photography Prints • Shot on My Own Dives • Kailua, Oahu
announcement: Aloha and welcome to ReefLightByLorraine! I'm Lorraine, a marine conservation biologist based in Kailua on the windward side of Oahu. Every print in this shop comes from a photo I took myself while diving Kāneʻohe Bay and the surrounding reefs, documenting our coral recovery. This is a small hobby shop and a portion of every sale goes back into local reef work. Framed prints are made to order, so please allow 1-3 weeks. Custom prints and commissions welcome — just message me!
sale_message: Mahalo for your order! Made-to-order prints are printed and framed within 3-5 business days. Every image was captured on my own dives here on the windward coast, and part of your purchase supports Kāneʻohe Bay coral recovery. Don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions — aloha!
policy_welcome: Mahalo for visiting ReefLightByLorraine! Every photograph here was taken by me, Lorraine Roach, a marine biologist documenting reef recovery on the windward side of Oahu. A portion of each sale supports coral restoration work in Kāneʻohe Bay.
policy_payment: I accept payments through Etsy's secure checkout system including credit cards, debit cards, Etsy gift cards, and PayPal. For custom framed-print commissions over $200, a 50% deposit is required.
policy_shipping: All items ship via USPS from Kailua, HI 96734. Made-to-order framed prints ship within 10-21 business days depending on size. Unframed prints and small goods go out within 3-5 business days. Framed prints ship flat with rigid padding and a protective corner guard; unframed prints ship in a photo sleeve with backing board.
policy_refunds: I want you to love your print! If it arrives damaged, please contact me within 48 hours with photos and I'll send a replacement or full refund. Because prints are made to order, I cannot accept returns for buyer's remorse, but I'll always make a genuine printing or framing defect right.
